critical_ui_failures.failure_reason: No login page or authentication UI found in codebase - only dashboard and landing pages exist
critical_ui_failures.suggested_fix: Implement authentication pages (login, signup, forgot password) with form validation using React Hook Form + Zod

critical_ui_failures.failure_reason: No authentication flow implemented - missing login page, auth context, and protected routes
critical_ui_failures.suggested_fix: Add NextAuth.js or custom auth with JWT, create login page at /login, protect dashboard routes

critical_ui_failures.failure_reason: No signup page exists in the application
critical_ui_failures.suggested_fix: Create /signup route with registration form, email verification flow

critical_ui_failures.failure_reason: Dashboard components show no explicit loading skeletons - data fetching hooks (use-agents, use-analytics) lack loading states
critical_ui_failures.suggested_fix: Add Suspense boundaries with skeleton loaders for each dashboard panel, implement loading states in data hooks

critical_ui_failures.failure_reason: No error boundary or error UI components found - api.ts throws ApiError but no UI catches it
critical_ui_failures.suggested_fix: Create ErrorBoundary component, add error toasts, implement retry logic in hooks

critical_ui_failures.failure_reason: Dashboard uses custom components (TiltCard, RotatingBorder) without focus management; no skip links or ARIA landmarks
critical_ui_failures.suggested_fix: Add focus-visible styles, skip-to-content link, proper heading hierarchy, ARIA labels on interactive elements
